summary: Iteration 81: Complete frontend verification of 3-currency inline table with taxes. All features working correctly: NumInput uses type='text' inputMode='decimal' (no spinners), only 3 currencies (INR/USD/AED), inline pricing table with tax rows, auto-calculations, validity badge, compact config row.

details: 32 inputs use type='text' inputMode='decimal' in pricing editor
NumInput component correctly avoids spinner arrows
Currency dropdown shows only: INR, USD, AED
EUR and GBP removed as expected
Row 1 header: Program | Dur | Unit | INR (India · GST 18%) | USD | AED (Dubai · VAT 5%)
Row 2 sub-headers: Per Unit | Total | Offer | Disc for each currency
USD section correctly omits Total column (only Per Unit, Offer, Disc)
INR and AED sections have all 4 columns
Money Magic Multiplier: INR 20,000/unit × 6mo = 120,000 total, 60,000 offer, 50% disc
Single row with: Package Name, Duration, Valid From, Valid To, Sessions, Carry Fwd, Notes
All fields visible on one line
Save button visible with purple background
Located in top-right of pricing config editor
Programs auto-populated: AWRP, Money Magic Multiplier, Bi-Annual Downloads, Quarterly Meetups
All data fields present in response

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 verified the 3-currency inline table redesign. Key features: 1) NumInput uses type='text' inputMode='decimal' (no spinners). 2) Only 3 currencies: INR, USD, AED (EUR/GBP removed). 3) Programs table shows all currencies inline with Per Unit/Total/Offer/Disc columns. 4) USD omits Total column. 5) Tax row: GST 18% for INR, dash for USD, VAT 5% for AED. 6) Annual Package Price = Subtotal Offer + Tax. 7) Config section compact on one row. 8) Validity badge next to header. Current pricing: AWRP (12mo, INR 90000/unit, 540000 offer), MMM (6mo, INR 20000/unit, 60000 offer). Subtotal INR: 1,200,000 total, 600,000 offer. Tax: INR GST=108,000, AED VAT=1,530. Final: INR 708,000, USD 11,775, AED 32,130.
